artifact_summary: Sample Hazen Report Creator output displaying October 2022 AWTP SCADA data and violations.
artifact_blurb: This document illustrates a sample report generated by Hazen Report Creator Software, specifically tailored for the Howard F. Curren Advanced Water Treatment Plant (AWTP) SCADA system. The report features a detailed data table containing operational readings from October 2022, alongside a dedicated section documenting system violations, serving as a reference example within the broader evaluation documentation.
